content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 你好，苏珊。我叫爱德华。[苏珊]: 你好。嗯，谢谢你同意和我谈话。我给你寄了一封信。[爱德华]: 是的。[苏珊]: 我正在读一个教育课程，研究地方机构如何与社区互动。几年前我来春贝旅游过。当我读到你们为学校开设的科学项目时，我想我可以把它作为一个案例研究。[爱德华]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Hello, Susan. My name's Edward. [Susan]: Hello. Uh, thank you for agreeing to talk to me. I sent you a letter. [Edward]: Yes. [Susan]: I'm doing an education course and I'm looking at how local institutions interact with their community. I was a tourist here in Chumbe a few years ago. And when I read about your science program for schools, I thought I could use it as a case study. [Edward]: Fine.

content.cn_text: 说吧，你想知道什么？[苏珊]: 嗯，我知道自从我第一次来这里，你们就扩大了活动范围。[爱德华]: 是的，我们春贝一直很重要，因为它是一个珊瑚岛，拥有各种各样的野生动物物种。但几年前，它的自然资源变得更加丰富了。[苏珊]: 是因为增加了保护措施吗？[爱德华]: 是的。我们被正式指定为自然保护区。现在我们有更多来自世界各地的人来
content.en_text: Go ahead and tell us what you want to know. [Susan]: Well, I know that since I first came here, you've expanded your activities. [Edward]: Yes, we have a Chumbe has always been important because it's a coral island and it's got a wide variety of wildlife species. But a few years ago, it became even richer in natural resources. [Susan]: Is that because there were increased safeguards? [Edward]: Yes. We were officially designated a nature reserve. And now we've got more people coming from all over the world to

content.cn_text: 参与我们正在进行的研究项目。[苏珊]: 你能告诉我学校项目的背景吗？我知道它始于2004年。我想它的目的是直接与学校的生态学教学大纲挂钩。[爱德华]: 对。我们是应一位当地小学教师的要求才做的。他问是否可以带他的学生来这里和我们的巡护员一起进行一些自然研究。然后我们开始为其他学校组织实地考察。我们获得了政府资助。最初为期12个月。
content.en_text: study here in our ongoing research program. [Susan]: Can you tell me about the background to the schools program? I know it started in 2004. And I think it was intended to link directly into the schools ecology syllabus. [Edward]: That's right. We responded to an approach by a local primary school teacher. He asked if he could bring his pupils here to do some nature studies with our Rangers. Then we started organizing field trips for other schools. We got government funding. Initially for 12 months.

content.cn_text: 那个期限最终延长了，但政府首先派了一个团队进行正式评估。[苏珊]: 你能简单告诉我他们的报告说了什么吗？[爱德华]: 他们发现总的来说，实地考察既有趣又富有启发性，并且有效地提高了儿童和教师对自然环境以及谨慎管理资源的必要性的认识。[苏珊]: 太好了。他们有没有提出任何改变建议？
content.en_text: That period was eventually extended, but the government sent a team to do a formal evaluation first. [Susan]: Do you mind just telling me briefly what their report said? [Edward]: They found that in general, the field trips had been enjoyable and stimulating and they'd been effective in raising awareness both in the children and also in their teachers of the natural environment and the need to manage resources carefully. [Susan]: Great. And did they suggest any changes?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 不完全是。他们告诉我们问题是什么，然后由我们自己决定如何解决。例如，反馈建议，如果学校有材料能让学生对生命科学有更好的基础知识，那么实地考察会更有益。[苏珊]: 我明白了。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Not exactly. They told us what the problems were and then they left it up to us to decide how to solve them. For example, the feedback suggested that the field trips could be even more beneficial if schools had materials to give them a better grounding in life sciences. [Susan]: I see.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 所以我们春贝的员工开始为学校制作材料。我们已经分发了一份信息资料包，供实地考察前在课堂上使用，这些材料似乎效果不错。
content.en_text: [Edward]: So our staff here in Chumbe started producing materials for schools. We're already distributing an information pack that we produced for using class prior to the field trips and that material seems to be working well.

content.cn_text: 我们也已经开始制作另一套关于珊瑚礁的资料包，专门为教师设计，将于九月试用。
content.en_text: And we've also begun work on another pack about coral reefs, specifically for teachers, which will be trialing in September.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在听接下来的讨论之前，你有一些时间看25到30题。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the discussion, you have some time to look at questions 25 to 30.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 反馈还告诉我们，学校在参加旅行时不太确定会遇到什么。所以我们决定安排我们的工作人员进行一次预备访问，做一次介绍。
content.en_text: [Edward]: The feedback also told us that schools weren't certain what to expect when they came on the trips. So we decided to institute a preparatory visit by our staff to give a presentation.

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 这包括什么？[爱德华]: 大约提前一个月，我们的教育团队成员会与老师和学生见面，并向他们讲解实地考察的示例行程。他们还会解释他们必须如何表现，因为我们必须非常注意健康和安全。
content.en_text: [Susan]: What does that involve? [Edward]: About a month beforehand, members of our education team meet teachers and pupils and talk them through a sample itinerary for their field trip. They also explain how they have to behave because we have to be very careful about health and safety.

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 我想你们也必须确保资源本身不受任何损害。
content.en_text: [Susan]: And I suppose you also have to make sure that the resources themselves don't suffer any damage.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 没错。团队做的另一件事是解释浮潜设备的正确使用方法，孩子们也可以试用。我们把所有设备都带到会议上。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Exactly. Another thing the team does is explain the correct handling of snorkeling apparatus and children are allowed to try it out. We take it all along to the meeting.

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 既然你们已经引入了这些变化，还会再进行一次评估吗？
content.en_text: [Susan]: And now that you've introduced these changes, will there be another evaluation?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 最终会的，是的。但我们已经收到了一些非常积极的非正式反馈。老师们告诉我们，他们对旅行做好了更充分的准备，对期望有了更好的了解，并且学生们对旅行感到不那么紧张了。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Eventually, yes. But we've already had some very positive feedback informally. Teachers have told us they feel better prepared for the trip and have a better idea what to expect and that the pupils feel less nervous about the trips.

content.cn_text: 此外，还有一些意想不到的好处。
content.en_text: And there've been a couple of unanticipated benefits too.

content.cn_text: 这里的员工说，预备访问有助于他们衡量学生对保护问题的理解水平。
content.en_text: Staff here say that the preparatory visits help them to gauge the level of the pupils in terms of their understanding of conservation issues.

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 这样你们就能更有效地根据每个团队的需求调整课程了？
content.en_text: [Susan]: So you can tailor your programme more effectively to the needs of each group?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 是的。而且由于我们的巡护员有机会解释潮汐以及珊瑚礁只能在特定时间步行参观的事实，各学校现在都更加准时到达了。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Yes. And also because our Rangers have a chance to explain about the tides and the fact that the coral reef can only be visited on foot at specific times, scores have been getting here much more punctually.

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 太好了。谢谢你告诉我这些。这很有用。
content.en_text: [Susan]: Great. Well, thank you for filling me in. That was very useful.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 还有什么我们可以帮助你的吗？[苏珊]: 我可以看看你提到的正式评估报告吗？
content.en_text: [Edward]: Is there anything else we can help you with? [Susan]: Could I possibly see the formal evaluation report you mentioned?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 可以。我可以安排给你一份。你也要资料包吗？
content.en_text: [Edward]: Yes. I can arrange to get you a copy. Do you want the materials packed too?

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 哦，那太好了。那我就可以带回去了。我不会在这里读它们。我只有几天时间，如果可能的话，我想问一些来过的老师一些问题。
content.en_text: [Susan]: Oh, that'd be great. Then I can take them back with me. I won't read them here. I've only got a couple of days and I'd like to ask a few of the teachers who've been here some questions if possible.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 我们会给你一些联系方式。但如果你有时间，你不想参加一次实地考察吗？
content.en_text: [Edward]: We'll give you some contact details. But if you've got time, wouldn't you like to participate in one of the field trips?

content.cn_text: 今天下午我们有一个新团体要来。
content.en_text: We've got a new group arriving here this afternoon.

content.cn_text: [苏珊]: 我会非常感激的。我本来想问能不能给他们拍些照片，但这样会更好。
content.en_text: [Susan]: I'd really appreciate that. I was going to ask if I could just take some photos of them, but this would be even better.

content.cn_text: 我的相机反正也不好使了。
content.en_text: And my camera is not working right anyway.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 好的。那为什么不和我们一起吃午饭呢？
content.en_text: [Edward]: Good. Well, why don't you come and have lunch with us?

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

items.title: The natural resources at Chumbe have increased since

options.title: A
options.content: more students have been involved in conservation.

options.title: B
options.content: the island gained protection under the law.

options.title: C
options.content: new species were brought in from other places.

items.title: What do we learn about the background to Chumbe’s education programme?

options.title: A
options.content: It was the idea of one of the Chumbe rangers.

options.title: B
options.content: It was privately funded for the first year.

options.title: C
options.content: It was designed to relate to the school curriculum.

options.title: A
options.content: some of the island’s resources still required better management.

options.title: B
options.content: both teachers and pupils had benefited from the field trips.

options.title: C
options.content: no changes to the education programme were necessary.

items.title: What materials have the Chumbe staff already produced?

options.title: B

options.title: C
options.content: a pack to help teachers and students prepare for the field trip
